title: Verilog: function without result won't hold previously returned value

features.name: function with conditional self-assignment without else
features.description: Code should include a function where the function name is assigned conditionally based on input values, without else clauses to handle all possible cases

features.name: function called in continuous assignment with unknown input
features.description: Code should include a function with conditional self-assignment that is called from a continuous assignment, where the function inputs can take unknown values causing all conditions to fail
features.snippet:
assign dout = func(din, sel);
// where sel can be 2'bxx or 2'bzz, causing all if conditions to fail
